creator: andy@neu.net
text:
Xcdroast cannot find cd-drive.

When starting the program, a dialog box says:
"Starting to scan for devices...
Scan finished."  Also, if I try to add the device manually it still fails to find it.

Dmesg:
GEOM: new disk cd0
cd0 at ahcich2 bus 0 scbus2 target 0 lun 0
cd0: <hp DVD-RAM GH60L RD05> Removable CD-ROM SCSI-0 device 
cd0: Serial Number B1ECDP1J54899
cd0: 150.000MB/s transfers (SATA 1.x, UDMA5, ATAPI 12bytes, PIO 8192bytes)
cd0: Attempt to query device size failed: NOT READY, Medium not present - tray closed

How-To-Repeat: Start Xcdroast
